title.rendered: Travel FX Hits a Milestone: 25,000 Trustpilot Reviews and Counting!

content.rendered:
What a November it’s been for Travel FX! Not only have we reached an incredible milestone of 25,000 Trustpilot reviews, but we’re also celebrating winning the Bronze Award in the British Travel Awards for Best Foreign Exchange/Travel Money Retailer.

We’re absolutely over the moon with these achievements and so grateful for the continued support from our customers. Moments like this remind us why we do what we do – to make travel money simple, secure, and reliable for UK travellers like you.

Trustpilot Milestone: Rated “Excellent” by You

Let’s talk about those 25,000 reviews! A massive 98% of our reviews are rated 5 Excellent, with another 1% at 4 Great. That means 99% of you have had positive experiences with us, and your feedback has helped us earn a Trustpilot rating of “Excellent.”

Every review is a reflection of the care and dedication we put into our services, and hitting this milestone is truly humbling. It’s your kind words, trust, and recommendations that keep us motivated to do even better.

Winning Bronze at the British Travel Awards

As if the Trustpilot milestone wasn’t exciting enough, we’re also honoured to have won the Bronze Award in the British Travel Awards for Best Foreign Exchange/Travel Money Retailer. Competing against some of the biggest names in the industry, this recognition is a huge moment for us as a small, independent business.

We owe this success to you – our loyal customers who not only use our services but also voted for us. Thank you for believing in us and helping us stand out in such a competitive field.

A Month to Remember

November has truly been a month to celebrate at Travel FX. These achievements remind us of the trust you place in us, whether it’s ensuring you get the best exchange rates, secure transactions, or fast delivery for your travel money. We’re grateful for every opportunity to make your travel plans just that little bit easier.

A Big Thank You to Our Customers

We couldn’t let this milestone pass without saying a massive thank you to all of you. Your reviews, votes, and ongoing support mean the world to us. Here are just a few of the lovely things you’ve said recently:

  • “Fantastic rates, great service, and super reliable – Travel FX never disappoints!”
  • “So easy to use, with amazing exchange rates. Highly recommend!”
  • “Top-notch customer service and fast delivery. Travel FX is the best!”

What’s Next?

While November has been one for the books, we’re already looking ahead. We’re committed to maintaining our high standards and continuing to provide the best travel money solutions for all your adventures. Whether you’re planning a city break, a winter getaway, or your next big holiday, we’re here to make sure your travel money is sorted.

Thank you for being part of this journey. Here’s to even more milestones ahead!

Need travel money? Visit Travel FX to see how we can help make your next trip stress-free and cost-effective.

With gratitude,
The Travel FX Team

itemListElement.name: Travel FX Hits a Milestone: 25,000 Trustpilot Reviews and Counting!

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
